chunks.heading: Purpose
chunks.text: Groove navigation is optimized for quick movement across dashboard, worktrees, tasks, diagnostics, and settings.

chunks.heading: Keyboard leader shortcuts
chunks.text: Global settings expose keyboard shortcut leader and leader bindings. Customize bindings to match your team workflow without changing feature behavior.

chunks.heading: Fast help usage
chunks.text: Open Help for focused how-to questions when you are blocked in a flow. Ask with feature context, expected outcome, and constraints.
